steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: Difficulties of documenting nocturnal pollinator visits and a general focus on diurnal invertebrate pollinators clearly point to a shortage or lack of information on nocturnal moths — a problem Anderson et al. later addressed with new technology.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”A dearth” means shortage or lack, perfectly matching what the documentation difficulties and diurnal focus have created.

The others don't convey shortage: abatement means reduction, aggregation means gathering, and dissonance means disagreement.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
